headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Quanta Services (PWR) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Quanta Services at US$750.73 is still offering value, or if the easy money has already been made. The stock has returned 3.2% over the last 7 days, 35.1% over the last month, 70.7% year to date and 130.3% over the past year, with a very large 5 year gain that is close to 7x. These moves are drawing more attention to how the company is priced, particularly as investors weigh up long term infrastructure and construction themes. This makes it important to...
